svg.title: Compliance Checker Algo — 8-layer pipeline
svg.desc: Standard and work product feed into eight analysis layers (node coverage, content alignment, semantic depth, concept coverage, reference integrity, method audit, traceability chain, gap analysis), and the layer findings are aggregated into a single compliance report.
svg.text: Standard-agnostic · stdlib-only · every clause judged by eight independent analyses
Standard-agnostic · Standard library only · 8 independent layers per clause
